creator: chmeeedalf@gmail.com
text:
Port devel/gccxml fails to compile on the powerpc architecture, with the following error:

In file included from /usr/ports/devel/gccxml/work/gccxml-0.6.0/GCC/gcc/gengenrtl.c:22:
/usr/ports/devel/gccxml/work/gccxml-build/GCC/gcc/hconfig.h:15:30: rs6000/xm-sysv4.h: No such file or directory

xm-sysv4.h was deleted in 2001 by the author, so it's likely that it never compiled on powerpc.

This blocks the build of boost-python-libs, needed for KDE4.

How-To-Repeat: Compile devel/gccxml on powerpc.
